title: Titman
compiled_truth: Titman is an external contact at [Mail](companies/mail). Over the corpus period (1999-12-28 to 2001-08-10), Titman sent 10 and received 33 emails, totalling 43 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (7), [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (3), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (1).
